plot outline: Set against the antebellum South, THE BIRTH OF A NATION follows Nat Turner (Nate Parker), a literate slave and preacher, whose financially strained owner, Samuel Turner (Armie Hammer), accepts an offer to use Nat's preaching to subdue unruly slaves. As he witnesses countless atrocities - against himself and his fellow slaves - Nat orchestrates an uprising in the hopes of leading his people to freedom.
title: The Birth of a Nation
akas: The Birth of a Nation - Aufstand zur Freiheit (Germany)
一个国家的诞生 (China, Mandarin title)
